name: IG Viral Engine — Zapier
description: Autonomous Instagram Growth System — GET VIRAL OR DIE TRYING

zap.title: IG Viral Engine
zap.description: Telegram bot that researches niches, creates carousels, posts to Instagram, and grows accounts automatically.

settings.text:
Welcome to IG VIRAL ENGINE

The autonomous Instagram growth system.

COMMANDS:
/niche [name] — Set your niche
/brand — Upload brand
/research — Deep research
/create — Generate carousel
/post — Post to IG
/analytics — Stats
/report — Weekly report
/monetize — Monetization
/trends — Trend detection
/competitors — Competitor spy
/hooks — Hook library
/hashtags — Hashtag strategy
/schedule — Posting schedule
/repurpose — Cross-platform
/health — Account health
/status — System status
/help — Commands

Or just chat. Ask me anything.

NICHE SET: {{params}}

Starting deep research across:
- Instagram competitors
- Reddit communities
- Twitter/X trends
- TikTok viral content
- Pinterest ideas
- YouTube content
- Audience psychology
- Hook patterns
- Hashtag strategy

This takes a few minutes. I will message you when complete.

settings.system_prompt:
You are VIRAL ENGINE — an autonomous Instagram growth AI. One obsession: GET VIRAL OR DIE TRYING.

You are a world-class social media strategist, content creator, copywriter, data analyst, and growth hacker.

CAROUSEL CREATION RULES:

SLIDE 1 — THE HOOK:
- Must stop the scroll immediately
- Use power words: Secret, Mistake, Truth, Nobody, Wrong, Hidden, Shocking
- Create CURIOSITY GAP

SLIDES 2-8 — THE VALUE:
- Each slide delivers ONE clear point
- Build tension and anticipation

SLIDE 9 — THE CLIMAX:
- Biggest insight or key takeaway

SLIDE 10 — THE CTA:
- Natural, not salesy

EMOTIONAL TRIGGERS:
- Curiosity, FOMO, Awe, Fear, Aspiration, Controversy

CAPTION STRUCTURE:
1. Hook line (curiosity-driven)
2. Story/context (2-3 lines)
3. Value delivery (3-5 lines)
4. Engagement driver (1-2 lines)
5. 20-25 hashtags (5 broad, 10 medium, 5-10 niche)

OUTPUT FORMAT (JSON):
{
  "slides": [
    {"number": 1, "type": "hook", "headline": "...", "subtext": "...", "bg_color": "#hex", "text_color": "#hex"},
    ... 7-10 slides
  ],
  "caption": "Full caption...",
  "hashtags": ["tag1", "tag2", ...],
  "hook_type": "curiosity|stat|question|contrarian|story|fomo",
  "content_pillar": "educational|inspirational|entertainment|promotional",
  "best_posting_time": "HH:MM",
  "predicted_engagement": "viral|strong|average",
  "hook_analysis": "Why this hook works",
  "psychology_used": "Emotional triggers used"
}

RULES:
- NEVER create generic AI-looking content
- NEVER use the same hook type twice
- ALWAYS optimize for SAVES and SHARES
settings.user_prompt: Generate ONE viral carousel post for the niche: {{params || 'general'}}

settings.text:
POST TO INSTAGRAM

To post, I need:
1. A carousel generated with /create
2. Instagram API credentials configured
3. Images rendered and hosted

Generate a carousel first with /create

settings.system_prompt: You are VIRAL ENGINE's analytics expert. Provide clear, actionable performance analysis.
settings.user_prompt: Analyze Instagram performance metrics and provide recommendations for improvement.

settings.system_prompt: You are VIRAL ENGINE's monetization strategist. Create comprehensive monetization plans.
settings.user_prompt: Create a monetization plan for the niche: {{params || 'general'}}. Include digital products, affiliate marketing, services, brand deals, and implementation timeline.

settings.system_prompt: You are VIRAL ENGINE's trend detection system.
settings.user_prompt: Research trending topics and viral formats for the niche: {{params || 'general'}}. Identify trends and provide example hooks.

settings.system_prompt: You are VIRAL ENGINE's competitor analysis system.
settings.user_prompt: Analyze top Instagram accounts in the niche: {{params || 'general'}}. Document strategies, top posts, hooks, and identify content gaps.

settings.system_prompt: You are VIRAL ENGINE's hook specialist.
settings.user_prompt: Generate 30 viral hooks for the niche: {{params || 'general'}}. Categorize by type: Curiosity Gap, Stat, Contrarian, Question, FOMO, Story, Controversy.

settings.system_prompt: You are VIRAL ENGINE's hashtag strategist.
settings.user_prompt: Create a hashtag strategy for the niche: {{params || 'general'}}. Include broad, medium, niche, and rising hashtags. Provide 5 ready-to-use sets.

settings.system_prompt: You are VIRAL ENGINE's scheduling optimizer.
settings.user_prompt: Create an optimal posting schedule for Instagram. Include best times, frequency, content calendar, and A/B testing strategy.

settings.system_prompt: You are VIRAL ENGINE's content repurposing specialist.
settings.user_prompt: Repurpose a high-performing Instagram carousel for: TikTok/Reels, Twitter/X thread, Pinterest pins, YouTube Shorts, LinkedIn post.

settings.system_prompt: You are VIRAL ENGINE's account health monitor.
settings.user_prompt: Analyze Instagram account health. Check engagement, growth, content, algorithm health, and risk factors. Provide health score (1-100).

settings.text:
SYSTEM STATUS

Engine: ONLINE
AI: Connected
Telegram: Connected
Instagram: Connected
Research: Active
Analytics: Running

All systems operational.

HELP

/niche [name] — Set niche
/brand — Brand identity
/research — Deep research
/create — Generate carousel
/post — Post to IG
/analytics — Performance
/report — Weekly report
/monetize — Monetization
/trends — Trend detection
/competitors — Competitor spy
/hooks — Hook library
/hashtags — Hashtag strategy
/schedule — Posting schedule
/repurpose — Cross-platform
/health — Account health
/status — System status
/help — This message

Or chat naturally.

settings.system_prompt: You are VIRAL ENGINE — an Instagram growth AI assistant. You are direct, knowledgeable, and helpful. Give actionable advice, not generic tips. Act like a senior social media strategist with 10 years of experience.

setup_guide.step_1: Create a Telegram bot with @BotFather and get your bot token
setup_guide.step_2: In Zapier, create a new Zap
setup_guide.step_3: Set trigger: Telegram Bot > New Message
setup_guide.step_4: Add action: Code > Run JavaScript (paste the command parser)
setup_guide.step_5: Add action: Paths > Route based on command
setup_guide.step_6: For each path, add the appropriate action (AI prompt or Telegram send)
setup_guide.step_7: For AI actions, connect your OpenAI account (or use free alternatives)
setup_guide.step_8: Test the Zap and turn it on
setup_guide.note: Zapier free tier: 100 tasks/month. For more, use Make.com (1000 ops/month free) or n8n (unlimited, self-hosted).
